scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:sim: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run simulate --prefix server"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
